scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm --filter @roleagent/shared build && node apps/desktop/scripts/generate-prisma.mjs && pnpm --filter @roleagent/server build && pnpm --filter @roleagent/desktop build && pnpm --filter @roleagent/desktop dev
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter @roleagent/shared build && node apps/desktop/scripts/generate-prisma.mjs && pnpm --filter @roleagent/server build && pnpm --filter @roleagent/web build && pnpm --filter @roleagent/desktop build
